reason: Summary says '1.8 million sq ft', not 1,800 MW. The MW value was misread from square footage. No power capacity figure is mentioned in the summary.
Summary explicitly states '7.65 GW' facility, which is 7,650 MW. The field listed 5,000 MW with no basis in the summary text.
Summary states the project 'received a 7.65 GW air permit from TCEQ'. 7.65 GW = 7,650 MW. The 11,000 MW (11 GW) figure does not appear in the summary.
No investment dollar figure appears anywhere in the summary. The $60B value is unsourced from the entry text.

Summary explicitly states 'This is a distinct action from the existing Southaven entry covering the $20B investment.' The $20B belongs to the main Southaven entry (southaven-ms-2026-02-18), not this lawsuit-specific entry.

Summary mentions a '2,000-acre data center' but no MW capacity figure. The 2,200 MW value is unsourced from the entry text.
Summary mentions no investment figure. The company is undisclosed, and no dollar amount is stated.
